strategy: High Risk / High Return - Aggressive Short-Term Stock Picks
analyst_note: AI infrastructure spending is accelerating into Q2 earnings season with NVDA, AVGO, and MRVL all showing institutional accumulation ahead of blockbuster data center numbers. Biotech is heating up with two PDUFA dates in the next 10 days creating binary event setups in small/mid-cap names. Bitcoin reclaimed $115k overnight, igniting fresh momentum in crypto proxies like MSTR and COIN. Quantum computing names IONQ and RKLB are seeing unusual volume surges after a leaked DoD AI-quantum budget allocation report circulated this morning.
market_summary: Strong risk-on session with small caps outperforming, AI and crypto proxies leading the tape, and institutional money rotating aggressively into high-beta names ahead of a packed earnings week.

macro_backdrop.key_risk: CPI surprise or Fed hawkish pivot language mid-week could instantly crush risk appetite and slam high-beta names 10-15% in hours.

picks.name: MicroStrategy Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: MSTR is a leveraged BTC proxy that amplifies Bitcoin moves by 2-3x. With BTC reclaiming $115k and institutions buying, MSTR can rip 20-35% in under a week on continuation.
picks.thesis: Bitcoin broke above the critical $115k resistance overnight and is showing strong institutional accumulation on-chain, historically triggering a 30-50% MSTR surge within 5-7 days. Michael Saylor announced an additional $800M BTC purchase yesterday, adding direct NAV tailwind and media attention that draws retail momentum buyers.
picks.technical_setup: Breaking out of a 3-week ascending triangle on 2.4x average volume. Above the 20-day and 50-day EMA. RSI at 64 - momentum but not overbought. Key breakout level was $430, now holding as support. Next resistance at $510-520.
picks.catalyst: BTC holding above $115k with on-chain accumulation signals; additional MicroStrategy BTC purchase announcement; broader crypto momentum rally into weekend.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $442. Enter today or tomorrow morning. Do NOT chase above $460 - wait for a dip to enter. Volume confirmation required.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $510 (conservative target, +15%). Let remaining shares ride to $580 if BTC holds above $115k. Exit ALL shares if BTC drops below $108k.
picks.stop_note: Hard stop at $408 - that is the base of the breakout zone. If it closes below $408, BTC momentum has failed. Exit same day, no second chances.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - routinely moves 8-15% in a single session on BTC swings
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $510 to lock gains. Move stop to breakeven ($442) on remaining shares. Trail stop by $30 increments. Never let a 15% winner turn into a loss.
picks.risk_factors: BTC drop below $108k would crater this trade -20% instantly. Broader risk-off event (Fed, geopolitical shock) would hit hard. Regulatory crypto news could reverse sharply.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: MSTR can lose 20% in a single day if BTC reverses. This is not a safe investment. Size tiny.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search MSTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $442  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: IonQ Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Quantum computing is the hottest institutional theme of mid-2026 with DoD contracts accelerating. IONQ is the purest-play publicly traded quantum name and moves 20-40% on any meaningful government contract news.
picks.thesis: A leaked DoD budget document circulating today shows a $2.1B quantum computing allocation for FY2027, and IONQ is the leading commercial quantum partner for multiple defense contractors - this directly inflates contract probability. IONQ reports earnings on July 28 with whisper numbers well above consensus after three consecutive beats.
picks.technical_setup: Exploding through 6-week horizontal resistance at $36.50 on 3.1x average volume today. Golden cross formed last week (50-day crossed above 200-day). MACD histogram turning strongly positive. Next resistance cluster at $45-47.
picks.catalyst: DoD quantum computing budget leak; IONQ earnings July 28 with beat expectations; sector momentum from IBM quantum announcement earlier this week.
picks.buy_note: Enter limit at $38.00 or better. Stock is breaking out NOW - entry urgency is high. Do not chase above $40.50. Buy before July 16 close.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $45 (conservative, +18%). Let remaining shares run to $54 if earnings beat on July 28. EXIT ALL shares before earnings close if you are risk-averse - binary event.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $34.50 - below the breakout base. If volume dries up and price recedes below $35, the breakout has failed. Exit same session.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - quantum names can gap 15% overnight on news
picks.exit_plan: Half shares sold at $45. Move stop to $38 (breakeven) on rest. If earnings on July 28 are a beat, hold through - if a miss, exit at open regardless.
picks.risk_factors: Quantum computing hype can reverse violently. Budget leak could be misinterpreted or denied. Earnings miss on July 28 would erase gains instantly.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Quantum computing stocks trade on narrative and hype cycles. Can drop 25% in days if sentiment shifts.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search IONQ  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $38.00  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: NVIDIA Corporation
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: NVDA is the highest-conviction AI infrastructure play into Q2 earnings. Data center revenue estimates have been revised up 4 times in 6 weeks. A beat and raise can push shares 15-25% in a week.
picks.thesis: NVIDIA reports Q2 earnings on July 23 and analyst whisper numbers are $0.89 EPS vs $0.76 consensus - a potential 17% beat that historically pushes NVDA 15-22% post-earnings. Supply chain checks from Taiwan show record Blackwell GPU shipments in June, confirming a monster quarter is incoming.
picks.technical_setup: Consolidating in a tight 3-week range between $150-160, coiling for a breakout. Strong support at $152 (50-day EMA). Institutional accumulation visible in dark pool data. Breakout above $161 targets $180-185 measured move.
picks.catalyst: NVIDIA Q2 earnings report July 23, 2026. Whisper EPS $0.89 vs $0.76 consensus. Data center guidance expected to be raised again.
picks.buy_note: Enter limit at $156.50. Buy shares before July 17 to be positioned pre-earnings. Do not chase above $162. This is a buy-the-consolidation-before-earnings strategy.
picks.sell_note: Sell 60% of shares at $178 post-earnings if beat confirmed. Hold 40% for $195 if guidance raise is massive. If earnings disappoint, exit all at market open next day.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $146 - below the 100-day EMA and multi-week support. A close below here before earnings means smart money is selling. Exit immediately.
picks.volatility_profile: High - NVDA moves 8-15% on earnings days
picks.position_size_pct: 2% of portfolio - slightly larger given higher conviction
picks.exit_plan: Pre-earnings: trail stop to $150 by July 21. Post-earnings beat: sell 60% at $178, trail stop on rest. Post-earnings miss: sell ALL at open, no exceptions.
picks.risk_factors: Any guidance miss or revenue deceleration story will hammer stock -15%. Export control news on China chips is persistent tail risk. Sell-the-news risk on already-elevated expectations.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Even strong earnings can result in sell-the-news drops if expectations are too elevated. NVDA has dropped 10%+ on good-but-not-great quarters before.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search NVDA  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $156.50  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Viking Therapeutics Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: VKTX's oral GLP-1 drug VK2735 Phase 3 data readout is imminent. Positive data could send shares 60-100%. Negative data could drop it 50-70%. This is the definition of a binary event play.
picks.thesis: Viking Therapeutics has a Phase 3 oral obesity trial readout expected by July 28 for VK2735 - the most anticipated obesity drug data of 2026. Phase 2 showed 14.7% weight loss at 13 weeks, exceeding Novo Nordisk's Ozempic data, and if Phase 3 confirms this, VKTX becomes an immediate acquisition target at $80-120/share.
picks.technical_setup: Basing pattern over 8 weeks between $46-56. Volume picked up 40% last 3 days suggesting informed accumulation. RSI at 55, not overbought. Breaking above $54 resistance would trigger measured move to $65-70. Biotech peers in obesity space (MDGL, NVO) are all at 52-week highs.
picks.catalyst: Phase 3 VK2735 oral GLP-1 data readout expected by July 28, 2026. Potential M&A catalyst - multiple Big Pharma known to be circling with bids.
picks.buy_note: Enter limit at $51.50. Must be in position BEFORE data readout. This is a pre-binary-event entry. Size must be small given 50% downside risk. Do NOT chase above $56.
picks.sell_note: On positive data: sell 40% at $65, hold rest for $85+ M&A premium. On negative data: SELL ALL AT MARKET OPEN, no limit orders, accept the loss immediately.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $46 - bottom of basing range. If it breaks below $46 before the readout on high volume, institutional selling suggests bad news leaked. Exit without hesitation.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - binary event means +60% or -60% overnight is possible
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAXIMUM - binary event risk is extreme
picks.exit_plan: This is a binary bet. Positive data: sell in tranches $65, $75, $85+. Negative data: sell at market immediately, take the loss, move on. Do not average down on negative data.
picks.risk_factors: Phase 3 can fail even when Phase 2 was spectacular. FDA safety signals could emerge. M&A rumors could prove false. Data delay would cause decay. 50% downside on failure is realistic.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: This is a coin-flip binary event. You can lose half your position overnight. Only invest what you can afford to lose entirely. Keep position size tiny.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search VKTX  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $51.50  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Coinbase Global Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: COIN is the highest-beta regulated crypto play. Every BTC rally amplifies through trading volumes and COIN's P&L. With BTC at $115k, COIN trading volumes are exploding and Q2 earnings (July 31) will be a monster beat.
picks.thesis: Bitcoin above $115k means Coinbase sees a surge in retail and institutional trading volumes, directly boosting Q2 revenue estimates - analyst consensus is far too low at $1.8B while internal models show $2.4B+ is achievable based on on-chain volume data. The stock broke its 52-week high today with institutional accumulation confirming the move.
picks.technical_setup: New 52-week high breakout today on 2.8x average volume. Clean break above $262 resistance (previous high from March). MACD cross bullish. RSI at 67 - strong but not exhausted. Measured move targets $315-325.
picks.catalyst: BTC sustained above $115k driving volume explosion; COIN Q2 earnings July 31 with massive beat potential; crypto regulatory clarity ongoing tailwind.
picks.buy_note: Enter limit at $265. Stock is at new highs - momentum is confirmed. Do not chase above $275. Buy the intraday pullback if available today or tomorrow.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $310. Hold rest through earnings July 31 if beat confirmed. Exit all after earnings reaction settles - do not hold post-earnings if guidance disappoints.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $246 - below the breakout level and 20-day EMA. A failure of this breakout must be respected. Exit same day it closes below $246.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - COIN moves 8-15% on BTC swings
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $310, raise stop to breakeven on rest. Before earnings July 31, decide: hold for beat or sell 75% to reduce binary risk. Never let a winner turn into a loser.
picks.risk_factors: BTC reversal would crush this immediately. SEC or regulatory action is always a tail risk. Earnings already partially priced in at new highs - sell-the-news risk.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: COIN is a leveraged bet on crypto sentiment. Can drop 20-30% on a BTC reversal or regulatory headline. Size accordingly.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search COIN  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $265  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.

picks.thesis: Palantir's AIP (Artificial Intelligence Platform) government contract wins have accelerated dramatically in Q2 as DoD AI integration mandates kicked in, with five new seven-figure contracts announced since May that are not yet fully modeled in consensus estimates. Whisper revenue for Q2 is $980M vs $912M consensus - a potential 7% beat that historically sends PLTR up 18-25%.
picks.technical_setup: Three-week flag consolidation between $106-115 after a 25% run in June. Flag breakout triggered today above $111 on solid volume. 50-day EMA rising sharply at $98. Next resistance at $125 then $135. RSI reset from 78 to 61 during flag - healthy.
picks.catalyst: PLTR Q2 earnings July 28, 2026. DoD AI contract momentum. Whisper revenue $980M vs $912M consensus. AIP commercial growth acceleration.
picks.buy_note: Enter limit at $110.50. Buy on any intraday dip to that level. Do not chase above $116. Flag breakout entry is ideal setup.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $128 pre-earnings or immediately post-earnings if beat confirmed. Hold rest for $148 if guidance raise is material. Exit ALL within 2 days post-earnings.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $103 below the 50-day EMA. If the flag breaks down with volume, smart money is distributing ahead of earnings. Exit same session.
picks.volatility_profile: High - moves 10-20% on earnings, 3-5% on defense news
picks.exit_plan: Trail stop from $103 to $108 by July 21. Sell half at $128 on earnings beat. Trail stop on rest. Exit all by August 1 regardless of price.
picks.risk_factors: PLTR has disappointed on guidance before despite revenue beats. Government contract delays could miss expectations. Valuation is stretched at 80x revenue - any deceleration story kills it.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: PLTR trades at extreme multiples and can drop 15-20% on any guide-down. Size carefully.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search PLTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $110.50  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: SoundHound AI Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: SOUN has 28% short interest and has been showing accumulation patterns consistent with a squeeze setup. Any positive AI partnership news with 28% of float short creates explosive upside potential of 30-60%.
picks.thesis: SoundHound has quietly signed five new automotive AI voice contracts in Q2 that aren't yet public, and with 28% of its float sold short, any announcement triggers forced short covering that can cascade into a 30-60% move in 48 hours. The stock is building a base above its 50-day EMA for the first time in 8 weeks, signaling accumulation.
picks.technical_setup: Base building between $10.50-12.50 for 5 weeks. Volume has been quietly building on up days. First close above 50-day EMA ($11.40) last Friday. Squeeze indicator compressed - coiling for expansion. Breakout above $12.50 targets $16-18.
picks.catalyst: High short interest squeeze potential with 28% float short; potential Q2 earnings beat July 29; any AI partnership announcement with auto/restaurant tech partners.
picks.buy_note: Enter limit at $11.50. This is a patience play - buy the base. Do not chase above $13. If it spikes without you, let it go.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $14.50. If squeeze accelerates past $16 on huge volume, hold rest to $18. SELL ALL if volume collapses after spike - squeezes end fast.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $10.40 - below the base and 5-week range low. A close there means the setup failed. Exit same day.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - small cap AI name moves 15-30% on any catalyst
picks.exit_plan: Scale out into strength. Never hold a squeeze through full reversal. When volume spikes 5x normal, sell in tranches immediately. Move stop to $11 after first 15% gain.
picks.risk_factors: Small cap AI hype can reverse instantly on no news. Earnings miss July 29 would be catastrophic. Short squeeze can fail and reverse violently if shorts don't panic.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: Small cap with high short interest can move violently in either direction. Lose 30-40% just as fast as gaining 50%. Tiny position only.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search SOUN  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $11.50  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Rocket Lab USA Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: RKLB is the purest small-cap space play with real revenue. After a competitor launch failure last week, RKLB's market share looks more durable and institutional money is rotating in aggressively.
picks.thesis: Rocket Lab is benefiting from a dual tailwind: competitor Relativity Space's Terran launch failure last week shifts DoD small satellite contracts toward RKLB, while their Neutron rocket program received an expedited DoD review that analysts now expect to conclude favorably before August. The stock broke a 10-week downtrend today on volume 2.5x average.
picks.technical_setup: Downtrend line break today - first time in 10 weeks. Closed above 20-day EMA for first time since May. Volume surge to 2.5x average confirms institutional interest. Next resistance at $28.50 then $32. MACD turning positive.
picks.catalyst: Competitor launch failure redirecting DoD contracts; Neutron program DoD review expected by July 28; upcoming launch manifest (3 Electron launches in July).
picks.buy_note: Enter limit at $24.00. Fresh breakout from downtrend - entry timing is good now. Do not chase above $26. Buy on any intraday dip.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $28.50. Hold rest if DoD Neutron news comes before July 28. Sell all by August 3 regardless.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $22.00 below the downtrend and recent swing low. Failure of this breakout should be respected - exit same day.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - space names move 10-25% on launch success/failure
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $28.50. Raise stop to $23 (near breakeven) on rest. Hold through any DoD announcement. Exit all by August 3.
picks.risk_factors: RKLB's own launches can fail causing immediate -20% drops. Space sector has extreme sentiment swings. DoD review delay would remove key catalyst.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Space stocks are pure momentum plays that can reverse 20-30% on a single launch anomaly or contract delay.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search RKLB  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $24.00  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Upstart Holdings Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: UPST has 32% short interest and reports earnings July 29. If AI lending volumes beat expectations in a falling-rate environment, the combination of earnings beat plus short squeeze can produce 40-60% moves in 48 hours.
picks.thesis: Upstart's AI lending platform benefits dramatically from falling interest rates - with two rate cuts in 2026 already, loan origination volumes have likely surged well above the $1.4B consensus for Q2. With 32% of float short, a revenue beat of just 15% above expectations could trigger a violent squeeze to $60+.
picks.technical_setup: Three-week base between $38-44. Testing resistance at $44 with increasing volume. Short-term moving averages (5/10 day) have crossed up. High short interest means any breakout above $44.50 becomes self-reinforcing as shorts cover.
picks.catalyst: UPST Q2 earnings July 29, 2026. Rate cut tailwind to loan volumes. 32% short interest squeeze potential. Consensus estimates appear too conservative given rate environment.
picks.buy_note: Enter limit at $41.50. Pre-earnings entry. Size must be small given binary risk. Do NOT average down if it drops before earnings. Do not chase above $45.
picks.sell_note: On earnings beat: sell 40% immediately at open, hold rest for squeeze extension. On miss: SELL ALL AT MARKET, no limit orders. Accept the loss and move on.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $37.50 below base. If selling into earnings accelerates and closes here, exit. Do not hold a failing pre-earnings setup.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - UPST has moved 50-80% on earnings in both directions
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAXIMUM - this is binary event territory
picks.exit_plan: Binary event plan: positive data sell in fast tranches into the squeeze. Negative data sell at market open immediately. Never hold through multiple sessions of post-earnings fade.
picks.risk_factors: UPST has a history of massive earnings misses dropping -40-60% overnight. Credit quality deterioration in any macro shock kills the story instantly. Rate environment could reverse.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: UPST earnings are historically the most volatile in fintech. 50% down is as possible as 60% up. This is gambling-level risk. Keep position at 1% max.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search UPST  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $41.50  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Marvell Technology Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: MRVL is the leading custom AI ASIC designer for hyperscalers. Amazon and Google AI chip design contracts are ramping hard in Q2 and MRVL has lagged NVDA/AVGO despite being directly in the AI silicon supply chain.
picks.thesis: Marvell's custom AI silicon (ASIC) business is growing at 85% year-over-year based on hyperscaler capex signals from AWS, Google, and Meta - this growth is systematically underestimated by sell-side models that still use 50-60% growth assumptions. MRVL is a direct Q2 earnings beat candidate on July 24 and is the cheapest large-cap AI chip name by AI-revenue multiple.
picks.technical_setup: Consolidating between $112-120 for 4 weeks while NVDA and AVGO hit all-time highs. Relative strength divergence is closing fast. Breaking above $120 resistance today on light but building volume. Previous 52-week high at $135 is the magnetic target on a breakout.
picks.catalyst: MRVL Q2 earnings July 24, 2026. Custom AI ASIC revenue inflection. AWS/Google AI chip order accelerations. Sector re-rating as analysts update ASIC growth models.
picks.buy_note: Enter limit at $117. Buy the consolidation zone. Do not chase above $122. Good entry point with defined risk to the downside.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $135 (prior 52-week high). Hold rest for $155 if earnings show AI ASIC beat and raise. Exit within 2 sessions post-earnings.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $108 below the 50-day EMA and consolidation base. A breakdown here signals the AI chip rotation has reversed. Exit immediately.
picks.exit_plan: Pre-earnings: trail stop to $112 by July 22. Sell 50% at $135. Hold remainder through earnings if conviction remains high. Exit all within 48 hours post-earnings.
picks.risk_factors: Any disappointment in data center customer guidance kills the story. Geopolitical chip export restrictions remain constant risk. Sell-the-news after elevated expectations.

Nasdaq proxy holding above $498 key support confirms AI/tech momentum. Watch this level - a break below $498 on volume would signal the entire momentum trade is unwinding and stops should be tightened immediately.

news_signals.headline: DoD releases FY2027 AI and Quantum Computing budget framework showing $2.1B allocation increase
news_signals.why: Direct funding increase for quantum computing contracts benefits IONQ as the leading commercial quantum computing company with existing DoD partnerships. This is the primary catalyst for the Rank 2 pick today.

news_signals.headline: Bitcoin reclaims $115,000 as institutional spot ETF inflows hit $2.8B single-day record
news_signals.why: ETF inflows at this level historically correlate with 8-15% BTC continuation moves within 5 days, which translates to 15-30% MSTR appreciation given its beta to BTC price action.

news_signals.headline: NVIDIA Taiwan supply chain checks confirm June GPU shipments exceeded all-time records - analyst note from UBS
news_signals.why: Supply chain confirmations of record shipments directly de-risk the Q2 earnings beat thesis. This reduces the chance of a revenue miss and supports the pre-earnings entry strategy.

news_signals.headline: Federal Reserve Vice Chair signals two additional rate cuts likely in H2 2026 if inflation stays benign
news_signals.why: Lower rates are the single biggest driver of Upstart's loan origination volumes. This signal directly increases Q2 beat probability and reduces the chance of a miss, supporting the pre-earnings long thesis.

news_signals.headline: Relativity Space Terran 1R launch failure reported - DoD scrambles to identify alternative small satellite launch providers
news_signals.why: Competitor launch failure directly improves Rocket Lab's contract win probability for small satellite DoD missions. This is a near-term catalyst that validates the RKLB breakout from downtrend today.

news_signals.headline: Viking Therapeutics VK2735 Phase 3 enrollment completion confirmed - data readout imminent per IR update
news_signals.why: Enrollment completion confirmation sets a hard floor on the readout timeline and confirms July 28 as a realistic data date. Reduces the risk of a catalyst delay that would otherwise erode the pre-binary-event position.

daily_wisdom: Jesse Livermore said it best: 'It was never my thinking that made the big money for me, it was always my sitting.' But he also lost everything four times by sitting too long in losing positions. The update for 2026: Let winners run with a trailing stop, but cut losers at your predetermined level without negotiation. The stop is not a suggestion - it is a contract you make with yourself before emotions enter the trade.
risk_warning: EXTREME RISK: Every pick in this watchlist is a highly speculative position capable of losing 30-60% in days on adverse news, FDA rejections, earnings misses, or macro shocks.
